# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability
Please report security issues privately via:
https://github.com/bora-yarkin/Mapty/security/advisories

If you are unable to use that link, open a minimal issue that requests a private contact channel.

## Supported Versions
Only the latest release is supported with security updates.
